log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══

END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
